title: Submit the contact form successfully
description: This verifies that a visitor can fill out the contact form on the portfolio page and receive a successful confirmation after submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Fill in the name field with Alex Morgan
Fill in the email field with alex.morgan@example.com
Fill in the message field with a brief inquiry about freelance work
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Inspect the animated hero and CyberDeck on first load
description: This verifies that a first-time visitor can land on the portfolio homepage and see the interactive hero experience rendered correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero content is displayed
Verify the CyberDeck 3D experience is displayed

title: Rotate the 3D model by dragging
description: This verifies that a visitor can manipulate the CyberDeck with a drag gesture and the interactive model remains visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Drag on the 3D model to rotate it
Verify the CyberDeck remains displayed after interaction

title: Reveal node labels on hover
description: This verifies that hovering CyberDeck nodes exposes their labels for exploration and discovery.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Hover over a CyberDeck node
Verify a node label is displayed

title: Show required-field validation when the message is missing
description: This verifies that the contact form blocks submission and shows validation feedback when a required message is omitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Fill in the name field with Alex Morgan
Fill in the email field with alex.morgan@example.com
Leave the message field empty
Submit the contact form
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the portfolio page

title: Use the portfolio on a smaller viewport
description: This verifies that the single-page portfolio remains usable on a mobile-sized screen with the hero, 3D area, and contact form accessible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set the viewport to a mobile size
Verify the portfolio content is displayed in the mobile layout
Verify the contact section is accessible on the page

title: Use the portfolio on a desktop viewport
description: This verifies that the single-page portfolio renders correctly on a desktop-sized screen with the main hero and contact section visible within the layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Set the viewport to a desktop size
Verify the portfolio content is displayed in the desktop layout
Verify the contact section is accessible on the page

title: Show email validation for an invalid address
description: This verifies that the contact form prevents submission and displays inline feedback when the email format is invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Fill in the name field with Alex Morgan
Fill in the email field with not-an-email
Fill in the message field with a brief inquiry about freelance work
Submit the contact form
Verify an email validation error is visible
Verify the form is still displayed

title: Keep 3D interaction usable while moving through the page
description: This verifies that a visitor can move from the hero to the contact section and still access both the interactive showcase and the form on the same page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll from the hero section toward the contact section
Verify the 3D showcase remains part of the page experience
Verify the contact form is visible
